title: Bees Reimagined
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1011243706063527961/1193699859249774614/pack.png?ex=65adaaa0&is=659b35a0&hm=49161ed7593288bfb1df76d7b358343d8f0b7b2341341403e7e984a235d88598&)

Bees Reimagined simply makes bees into a much smaller 3x4 pixel cube, so a lot smaller and cuter! No more flying blobs! [OPTIFINE OR SIMILAR MODS REQUIRED]

This pack is originally from my pack [Minecraft Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined) but I thought some people may like it but not my pack, so I decided to give it, it's standalone pack!

![Line](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1011243706063527961/1069384365785743534/line2.png)

[![Discord](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1011243706063527961/1069297932811116564/discord.png)](https://discord.gg/rstmkrGeFJ)

Want to support Reimagined? For no extra cost, I get a part of the revenue via the purchases made through [this](https://partners.shockbyte.com/reimagined) link
